firsttime.name: Witch Ilianna
firsttime.text: Oh... You want to talk with me..? Sure then... Is there anything you want to ask me..?

cold.name: Witch Ilianna
cold.text:
Cold..? Oh right.. you aren't used to this place.. Legends say that many years ago a god cursed this land with eternal freeze..

But that's just a legend after all.. In reality there's giant Ice Crystal underground.. probably... it would be cool...
Oh sorry.. Looks like I'm talking nonsense again..

god.name: Witch Ilianna
god.text:
I'd be more than happy to tell you more... But there's almost no recorded information about this god.. It didn't stop humans from naming them... They called them "Elysienna"...

I'm sorry but I don't know anything else...

icemagic.name: Witch Ilianna
icemagic.text:
Yeah.. Ice Crystal... Oh.. sorry... It might've not been too obvious...

What I meant that there's a giant Ice Crystal, the same as humans use to perform magic, but burried underground without any vessel... So you know.. It just uses its magic on its own... But that's just my theory...

morexhuh.name: Witch Ilianna
morexhuh.text:
Morex... You're asking about it because I'm buying its essence right..? A mystical purple slime with two horns... It probably doesn't exist... like half of the things Kerim Morex discovered... Did Kerim even exist.. or maybe they just put most notable discoveries under one alias...

Sorry I got sidetracked... What was I.. Right.. Morex... As I was saying it's supposed to be a purple slime with horns... Since it's a slime, it must have its own essence... According to legends... the Morex is really strong so even if someone found it they likely would've died trying to gather its essence... Doesn't hurt to offer to buy that essence from people... Chances are low but never zero after all...

aboutmehuh.name: Witch Ilianna
aboutmehuh.text:
Huh..?! About me..?! Uhm.. I'm just a witch buying stuff from people... I should be ashamed since my master is part of the Council of the Magical Order... and out of all of the successor of the Great Aina I'm the most pathetic one...
I'm sorry... I shouldn't have said all that... Let's forget about it, alright..?

masta.name: Witch Ilianna
masta.text: Sorry... but I don't want to talk about it right now...

order.name: Witch Ilianna
order.text: Sorry... but I can't talk about it too much...

bye.name: Witch Ilianna
bye.text:
See you later..
May the Astra guide your way...
